title: Yogi
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Yogi''''' was the designation given to a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warships]], along with fellow [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[Chip (CR90 corvette)|''Chip'']], participated in a battle that saw the destruction of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] freighter group ''[[Sornsen]]'' and the corvette group ''[[Shurik]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
